prestazioni: Engine: 3.3L inline-8 (Type 57C supercharged, code: 57C-457) with a bespoke Rotrex C38-92 supercharger upgrade (12 psi boost, replacing the original Roots-type blower), paired with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Radium Engineering featuring dual 60mm throttle bodies and a port-injected fuel system using Bosch Motorsport 2000cc/min injectors (PN: 0 280 158 109).

Drivetrain: Reinforced 4-speed manual transmission (Type 57C gearbox) with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part no. QDF7J) and a custom lightweight flywheel by Tilton Engineering (6.5 lbs, steel-backed ceramic clutch, PN: 64-10002).

Suspension & Handling: Full chassis reinforcement with a custom-fabricated tubular subframe by Heidts Hot Rod & Muscle Car Parts (PN: IFS-57C), paired with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400 lbs/in spring rates) and a bespoke sway bar kit by Addco (1.25" front, 1" rear, hollow-core).
estetica: Body: Custom aluminum widebody conversion by The Rod Shop (1930s Art Deco-inspired, riveted panels) with a hand-formed carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by APR Performance (PN: CF-57C-SPLITTER/DIFFUSER), finished in a two-tone Bugatti Blue (PPG DBC9000) and polished aluminum accents.

Wheels: Custom 18x9 (front) and 18x11 (rear) forged aluminum wheels by BBS (LM-style, center-lock, 3-piece construction, PN: BBS-LM-57C) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear).

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door panels by Katzkin (Bugatti Blue with contrast stitching), paired with a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede, quick-release hub) and a bespoke roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in, chrome-moly).
